sourcesContent: ## See it in action Here you have a basic example of how the auto progress bar is rendered. ```vue ``` ### Play with props In this example, the auto progress bar has been set to do an animation for 5 seconds. There is a way to cancel the animation by sending the isLoading prop to false. ```vue ``` ## Events This component emits the following events: - `UserClickedARedirection` after the user clicks the redirection button. - `UserClickedAbortARedirection` after the user clicks the abort redirection button.
